comments.body: [~sunilg] Does this JIRA handles for V1 OR V2 timeline server?

Thanks [~rohithsharma]. I planned this one for Timeline V1. I have another ticket YARN-4013 for updating unmanaged AM flag in TimelineV2. As YARN-3948 is getting committed, I will be updating priority also along with YARN-4013.
Please suggest if this is fine.
Thats fine.. YARN-4013 ticket can be updated for app priority too..
I mean Jira summary and description.

Uploading patch. Also will upload screen shots.
Kindly help to check the same
Thanks [~sunilg] for the patch, overall patch is resonal to me. Have you verified the patch in real cluster?

Hi [~rohithsharma]
This patch already takes care of timeline web ui display. Hence will cover the column rendering with app priority correctly. I already attached screen shots. Kindly check.
Yes. I have verified in a real cluster and ran few MR jobs. Screen shots are from real UI.
Attached same patch again for jenkins to kick off

HI [~rohithsharma]
Pre-findbugs warnings are not related with this patch. There is one item shown in WebPageUtils.java which is fine for now. As we display priority in FairScheduler page, we can update a new column value and it will be vanished.

Checkstyle warnings are for already existing code. AppReport newInstance has more that 7 items as arguements. I feel it can be suppressed.

As for tests, YARN-4034 will handle test failures for TestRMAdminService. other test cases are passing locally.
YARN-4035 is the correct issue. By mistake i gave wrong one in earlier comments.
+1 for the latest patch, If no objection will commit it..

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body: [~sunilg] Does this JIRA handles for V1 OR V2 timeline server?

Thanks [~rohithsharma]. I planned this one for Timeline V1. I have another ticket YARN-4013 for updating unmanaged AM flag in TimelineV2. As YARN-3948 is getting committed, I will be updating priority also along with YARN-4013.
Please suggest if this is fine.
Thats fine.. YARN-4013 ticket can be updated for app priority too..
I mean Jira summary and description.

Uploading patch. Also will upload screen shots.
Kindly help to check the same
Thanks [~sunilg] for the patch, overall patch is resonal to me. Have you verified the patch in real cluster?

Hi [~rohithsharma]
This patch already takes care of timeline web ui display. Hence will cover the column rendering with app priority correctly. I already attached screen shots. Kindly check.
Yes. I have verified in a real cluster and ran few MR jobs. Screen shots are from real UI.
Attached same patch again for jenkins to kick off

HI [~rohithsharma]
Pre-findbugs warnings are not related with this patch. There is one item shown in WebPageUtils.java which is fine for now. As we display priority in FairScheduler page, we can update a new column value and it will be vanished.

Checkstyle warnings are for already existing code. AppReport newInstance has more that 7 items as arguements. I feel it can be suppressed.

As for tests, YARN-4034 will handle test failures for TestRMAdminService. other test cases are passing locally.
YARN-4035 is the correct issue. By mistake i gave wrong one in earlier comments.
+1 for the latest patch, If no objection will commit it..
